name: New Mexican Fry Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Oat Blend flour or all-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt in a mixing bowl; cut in shortening.
2. Stir in warm water. Place dough on a lightly floured surface.
3. Knead and fold until smooth and satiny. Cover and let stand for 15 minutes.
4. Form into 1-inch balls; keep covered.
5. Roll each ball into a thin 3-inch circle. Cover circles with waxed paper, separating circles.
6. Pinch and pull the circle edges (lightly) as you drop them into preheated oil in a deep fryer.
7. Fry 1 or 2 at a time. Fry for 1 minute; turn and fry for another 1 minute or until golden brown.
8. Serve with honey or Orange Honey Butter. Makes about 1 dozen.
Converted by MCBuster.
